archetype: Custom Wasteland Retro-Futurism (High-Contrast Comic + Earthy Amber Terminal)
global_rules: Mobile-first constraint: max-width 400px centered on screen for desktop.
Comic-book aesthetic: thick borders (2px-4px solid), heavy shadows (hard offset dropshadows), angular panels.
Terminal vibe: Scanline overlays, glowing amber monospace text for stats.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

loot_tiers.celestial: text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-red-500 via-yellow-500 to-purple-500 border-pink-500 animate-pulse font-bold

components.container: w-full max-w-[400px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0A0806] text-[#F59E0B] relative overflow-x-hidden font-body border-x border-[#F59E0B]/20
components.button: font-comic text-xl uppercase px-4 py-2 border-2 border-[#F59E0B] bg-[#1A130F] text-[#F59E0B] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#F59E0B] hover:bg-[#F59E0B] hover:text-[#0A0806] active:translate-y-1 active:translate-x-1 active:shadow-none transition-all
components.card_comic: bg-[#1A130F] border-2 border-[#F59E0B] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#F59E0B] p-4 relative
components.terminal_screen: bg-[#0A0806] border border-[#F59E0B]/50 p-4 relative overflow-hidden font-mono
components.dialogue_bubble: bg-[#FAFAFA] text-[#0A0806] border-2 border-[#0A0806] rounded-xl rounded-bl-none p-3 font-body shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#F59E0B] text-sm
components.fog_of_war_cell: w-full aspect-square border border-[#F59E0B]/20 bg-[#0A0806] flex items-center justify-center transition-colors hover:bg-[#1A130F]
components.health_bar: h-4 w-full bg-[#1A130F] border border-[#F59E0B] overflow-hidden
components.ap_bar: h-4 w-full bg-[#1A130F] border border-[#F59E0B] overflow-hidden

visual_effects.scanlines: pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 bg-[linear-gradient(to_bottom,transparent_50%,rgba(0,0,0,0.3)_50%)] bg-[length:100%_4px] z-[100] mix-blend-overlay

images.description: Desolate wasteland, foggy atmosphere. Ideal for title screen.
Stylized bust of a survivor, use for character UI or dialog.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install fonts from Google Fonts: Bebas Neue, VT323, Outfit. Use @phosphor-icons/react for UI icons.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_enforcement:
Wrap the main router/app in
...
to strictly enforce the mobile portrait constraint on all devices.
instructions_to_main_agent.component_usage: DO NOT rely on Vercel-like soft cards. Use pure HTML/Tailwind with 'card_comic' definitions for hard borders, harsh shadows, and flat backgrounds.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_testids: Ensure EVERY button, link, and interactive grid cell includes a descriptive data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent.vats_targeting: For V.A.T.S, overlay the screen with monospace terminal data. Use [ ] brackets around target zones with click handlers.
instructions_to_main_agent.fog_of_war: Construct the 7x7 grid using CSS Grid (grid-cols-7). Use 'fog_of_war_cell_unexplored' styling for hidden zones, and 'fog_of_war_cell' for explored ones. Overlay the player icon on the active cell.
instructions_to_main_agent.loot_shimmer: For Celestial loot tier, leverage background-clip: text with an animated linear gradient to produce the requested rainbow shimmer effect.
instructions_to_main_agent.terminal_fx: Include a fixed div overlay with the 'scanlines' effect class set to pointer-events-none over the main 400px container for persistent PIP-Boy atmosphere.
